patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (patient ID 104) with documented mixed dyslipidemia (listed as primary), hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus, essential hypertension, and postoperative/unspecified anemia. Key supporting labs include a 07/03/2023 lipid panel showing triglycerides 158 mg/dL (H), LDL 62 mg/dL, VLDL 32 mg/dL (H), and iron studies same day with iron 41 ug/dL (L), iron saturation 15% (L), and ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H). Recent care includes primary care and upcoming hematology and other specialty visits in 2024-2025. Multiple care team members are documented including Hand HA MD (PCP) and providers at Piedmont. There is a documented conflict in date of birth between source records.
